name: IBM RS/6000 SP RAMP: Market Research Proposal
description: This proposal outlines a dual-objective Aberdeen Group market research engagement for IBM's RS/6000 SP parallel system: producing a commercial customer case-study white paper for the IBM sales force, while simultaneously investigating evidence that the SP has been mis-sold at some accounts with unrealistically high customer expectations. Aberdeen proposes structured telephone and face-to-face interviews with SP commercial customers to surface best-practice application profiles and, where present, diagnose the extent of any customer dissatisfaction problem before it becomes a broader issue for IBM.
